steps.title: Use the flaw description
steps.content: The passage says mechanical recycling is associated with environmental impact and loss of material quality. The blank must describe a process that is not good enough because of those problems.

steps.title: Reject positive descriptors
steps.content: A suggests durability, C suggests activity or adaptability, and D means good enough; all conflict with the listed flaws. The remaining word means insufficient or not adequate. The answer is B.
